query:
SELECT
            CASE
                WHEN v.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 0
                WHEN vsv.visible IS NOT NULL THEN vsv.visible
                WHEN v.hidden_at IS NULL THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS "visible!: i64"
         FROM videos v
         LEFT JOIN video_student_visibility vsv
                ON vsv.video_id = v.id AND vsv.student_id = ?
         WHERE v.id = ?
